items.title: Exploits and vulnerabilities in Q1 2026

mitre_tactics.name: Phishing
mitre_tactics.justification: Phishing (Initial Access) — Spearphishing messages used to gain initial access to victim systems. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Exploitation for Client Execution
mitre_tactics.justification: Exploitation for Client Execution (Execution) — Exploitation of software vulnerability in client applications to achieve code execution. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
mitre_tactics.justification: Command and Scripting Interpreter (Execution) — Adversary abuses command-line or scripting interpreters to execute malicious code. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Malicious Link
mitre_tactics.justification: Malicious Link (Execution) — Victim clicks malicious URL that delivers payload or executes drive-by exploit. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution
mitre_tactics.justification: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution (Persistence) — Malicious code configured to execute automatically at system boot or user logon. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.
